name: Cell Passaging (Subculture)

components.name: 3. PBS 洗涤 1–2 次 (去除血清)
4. 加胰酶-EDTA (0.05–0.25%)
components.note: T75: 2–3 mL; 均匀覆盖底面

components.name: 5. 37°C 孵育 2–5 min
components.note: 轻拍瓶壁, 镜下确认脱落

components.name: 6. 加含血清培养基终止消化
7. 吹打混匀成单细胞悬液
8. 按比例接种到新瓶
components.note: 常用传代比: 1:3–1:10; 记录代数

components.name: 9. 补足培养基, 标记, 放入培养箱

notes.en: Over-confluence causes contact inhibition and phenotypic changes. Some cell lines are trypsin-sensitive (e.g., HEK293) — use Accutase or TrypLE instead. Suspension cells: dilute directly. Track passage number — characteristics may change after 20-30 passages. Freeze backup samples at each passage. Use Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free PBS.
notes.zh: 过度汇合会导致接触抑制和表型变化。部分细胞系对胰酶敏感（如 HEK293），用 Accutase 或 TrypLE 代替。悬浮细胞直接稀释传代。记录传代数——超过 20–30 代后细胞特性可能改变。每次传代预留样品冻存。用不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 PBS。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 13; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

usage.en: Subculture adherent mammalian cells by trypsinization and re-plating.
usage.zh: 通过胰酶消化传代贴壁哺乳动物细胞。
